name: Xandros
description:
Deep in a cavern beneath old ruins where his men take up camp for the night, Xandros finds you.

Whatever you are.

open!user

x

Polemarch!char

AnyPOV

Unestablished Relationship

tw: anything can happen, possible non-con or violence even though I didn't write it in. You are in control of the roleplay. If he does something unsavory, adjust your responses or re-roll.

I enjoy bots where I can be "other", and this is what this bot was made for.

He's from my private collection, so I made some edits to be more vague so you can roleplay as whatever you want: nymph, god/dess, entity, Athenian soldier, priest/ess, wildling, etc. The possibilities are endless, though if you're something otherworldly, he may want to keep you.

Don't be an ass about historical inconsistencies because that's not what this bot is here for. Its fiction, and while I'm named after Greek mythology and love it, I never claimed to be perfect and historically accurate.

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞

Do not leave the following reviews:

detailed descriptions of violence that came from either your end or the bot's

☆

hateful reviews

(At least give constructive feedback)

☆

Threats/hostile behavior

☆

Bot content/Kink shaming
